infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NutriSnap needs camera access to photograph your meals for AI analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NutriSnap needs photo library access to analyze your meal photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: NutriSnap needs permission to save photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NutriSnap to access your camera to photograph meals.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NutriSnap to access your photos for meal analysis.
